{{Quote|Ki Sazen saved my people. She was only a Padawan when she came to Tas-La and slew the Spine Dragon of M'dweshuu.|[[Chevuk]]|<ref name="TOR:TCoKS" />}}
'''Tas-La''' was a world<ref name="TOR:TCoKS" /> in the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]] of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="SotSR" />
